negative_variants.description: Analog Primitive Isource Instance: instantiates an isource primitive, but hard-codes .dc(0.0) instead of using the required ibias parameter.
Analog Primitive Isource Instance: instantiates the correct primitive type, but hard-codes .dc(5u) instead of using ibias.
Analog Primitive Isource Instance: instantiates the correct primitive type, but hard-codes .dc(0.5u) instead of using ibias.
Analog Primitive Isource Instance: instantiates the correct primitive type, but uses .dc(ibias + 0.5u) instead of the exact ibias expression.
Analog Primitive Isource Instance: instantiates the correct primitive type, but scales the parameter as .dc(0.8 * ibias).
